changes: Spirits Within: Potency increased from 250 to 270.
Expiacion: Potency increased from 300 to 340.
Blade of Faith: Potency increased from 250 to 420.
Blade of Truth: Potency increased from 350 to 500.
Blade of Valor: Potency increased from 420 to 580.
Tomahawk: Potency increased from 100 to 150.
Phantom Rush: Potency increased from 1,000 to 1,150.
Dragon Sight: Range extended from 12y to 30y; target party member is no longer required to remain within 12y to receive Left Eye; channeling animation removed.
Raiden Thrust: Potency increased from 260 to 280.
Stardiver: Potency increased from 500 to 620.
Heavens' Thrust: Combo potency increased from 430 to 480.
Chaotic Spring: Combo potency increased from 240 to 260; rear combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Spinning Edge: Potency increased from 200 to 210.
Gust Slash: Potency increased from 140 to 160; combo potency increased from 300 to 320.
Aeolian Edge: Potency increased from 120 to 140; rear attack potency increased from 180 to 200; combo potency increased from 340 to 360; rear combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Armor Crush: Potency increased from 120 to 140; flank attack potency increased from 180 to 200; combo potency increased from 320 to 340; flank combo potency increased from 380 to 400.
Hyosho Ranryu: Potency increased from 1,200 to 1,300.
Hakaze: Potency increased from 150 to 180.
Jinpu: Combo potency increased from 250 to 280.
Shifu: Combo potency increased from 250 to 280.
Ogi Namikiri: Potency increased from 800 to 900.
Kaeshi: Namikiri: Potency increased from 1,200 to 1,350.
Drill: Potency increased from 550 to 570.
Air Anchor: Potency increased from 550 to 570.
Chain Saw: Potency increased from 550 to 570.
Cascade: Potency increased from 180 to 220.
Fountain: Combo potency increased from 240 to 280.
Reverse Cascade: Potency increased from 240 to 280.
Fountainfall: Potency increased from 300 to 340.
Technical Finish: 4 Steps potency increased from 1,080 to 1,200.
Fire III: Potency increased from 240 to 260.
Blizzard III: Potency increased from 240 to 260.
Blizzard IV: Potency increased from 300 to 310.
Fire IV: Potency increased from 300 to 310.
Xenoglossy: Potency increased from 660 to 760.
Astral Impulse: Potency increased from 430 to 440.
Ruby Rite: Potency increased from 430 to 450.
Fountain of Fire: Potency increased from 520 to 540.
Dragon Sight: Target party member is no longer required to remain within 15y in order to activate Left Eye.
Dragon Sight: The channeling animation between the dragoon and their target has been removed.
Arcane Crest: An issue wherein the action did not grant the Crest of Time Returned effect to party members further than 1 yalm away has been addressed.

new_content.name: The Stigma Dreamscape
new_content.description: Dungeon where an issue with Proto-Omega's Guided Missile and Chemical Missile target selection was resolved.

housing.name: Dance Pole
housing.description: An indoor housing item that characters can interact with to perform a unique pole dancing emote.

glamour.name: Dance Pole
glamour.description: An item that was incorrectly able to be sold to NPC vendors; this issue has been addressed.
